title: MapTiler Static Maps API Example
description: Example requests for the MapTiler Static Maps API, generating non-interactive PNG map images.

examples.name: Center-based static map
examples.description: Render a 512x512 PNG map centered on Zurich at zoom level 12.

examples.name: Bounding-box static map
examples.description: Render a 800x600 PNG map showing Switzerland's bounding box.

examples.name: Auto-fitted static map with marker
examples.description: Render a 600x400 PNG that auto-fits to markers placed on the map.
